## UC-01: Add a new task
<!-- AC-1 → AC-4 map to e2e/flows/add-task/UC-01-add-task/AC-*.yaml -->

- [X] **T004 GATE** — confirm `e2e/flows/add-task/UC-01-add-task/` exists with all 4 AC flow files (AC-1, AC-2, AC-3, AC-4)
- [X] T005 [P] Create `Task` type definition in `src/types/task.ts` (id, title, completed, createdAt, updatedAt) and action types (ADD_TASK, TOGGLE_TASK, DELETE_TASK, SET_FILTER, SET_TASKS)
- [X] T006 [P] Create SQLite service in `src/services/db.ts` — schema creation, `insertTask()`, `getTasks(filter)`, `getActiveCount()`
- [X] T007 [P] Create `TaskContext` + reducer in `src/context/TaskContext.tsx` — wraps app, handles ADD_TASK action, syncs to SQLite on every write, initialises from DB on mount
- [X] T008 Create `useTasks()` custom hook in `src/hooks/useTasks.ts` — exposes tasks, activeCount, addTask, dispatch
- [X] T009 [P] Create `TaskInput` component in `src/components/TaskInput.tsx` — text input with `testID="task_input"`, add button with `testID="add_button"`, trim whitespace, reject empty on submit
- [X] T010 [P] Create `TaskRow` component in `src/components/TaskRow.tsx` — displays task title, checkbox with `testID="task_checkbox"`, wrapper with `testID="task_row_{task.id}"`
- [X] T011 [P] Create `TaskList` component in `src/components/TaskList.tsx` — FlatList with `testID="task_list"`, renders TaskRow items
- [X] T012 Wire up main screen in `app/index.tsx` — compose TaskInput + TaskList, wrap with TaskContext.Provider, pass useTasks hook

- [X] **T013 GATE** — `maestro test e2e/flows/add-task/UC-01-add-task/` → all 4 AC flows GREEN (requires device/simulator)
